name: Busy
quote: Work to live or live to work? I’m sure I’ll figure it out on that bench over there.

name: Darning
quote: Every view hides something, you cannot see the whole without missing details, you cannot look at the details and understand the whole.

name: Lost&Found
quote: Nothing is truly lost until you stop looking for it

name: Neon Beings
quote: There’s beauty in light, there’s beauty in shadow. People are just a reflection of everyday events, I’m just trying to express the radiance behind the greyness.

name: Spaces of Changing
quote: True silence it’s in a place that lives for itself and has no trace or voice for the likes of you… you are the outsider.
